store.name: Ideal Indiska LIVS
store.tagline: Everything You Need. Just Around the Corner.
store.description: Leading Indian and Pakistani grocery store in Stockholm, Sweden. 1500+ authentic products online and in-store.

hours.note: Hours may vary on public holidays. Call to confirm.

delivery.no_free_shipping: We do not offer free shipping. Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on order weight and destination.

stockholm_dhl.note: Customers can also choose DHL for heavier orders within Stockholm. Rates calculated by weight.

store_pickup.how: Select 'Store Pickup' at checkout. You get an email/SMS when ready to collect.

rest_of_sweden_dhl.example_kalmar: Kalmar: 2–4 business days, all Kalmar County postcodes (390xx–398xx). DHL Service Points: ICA Berga Centrum, Mekonomen, Direkten Tobaksboden.

europe.customs: NO customs duties or import taxes for EU countries — we ship from Sweden which is an EU member state. Customers in EU pay exactly what they see at checkout, nothing extra.
europe.norway_note: IMPORTANT: Norway is NOT an EU member. Norwegian customers may be charged customs duties and import VAT by Norwegian customs (Tollvesenet) upon arrival. We cannot predict or cover these costs. Please check Norway customs rules before ordering.
europe.tracking: All international shipments are fully tracked and insured. Tracking number sent by email.

delivery.frozen_restriction: IMPORTANT: Frozen foods and fresh produce CANNOT be shipped via DHL. They are ONLY available for Stockholm local delivery. All dry goods, spices, rice, lentils, oils, packaged snacks ship everywhere.

halal_meat_frozen.name: Frozen Foods & Halal Meat
halal_meat_frozen.note: Stockholm local delivery only — cannot be shipped via DHL

faqs.question: Do you offer free shipping?
faqs.answer: No, we do not offer free shipping. Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on your order weight and delivery destination.

faqs.question: Do you ship to Europe?
faqs.answer: Yes! We ship to all EU countries via DHL Parcel Connect with NO customs duties — since we ship from Sweden (EU), there are no hidden import taxes. Delivery takes 2–4 days to Scandinavia and 4–7 days to the rest of Europe.

faqs.question: Do you ship to Norway?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship to Norway. However, Norway is not an EU member, so Norwegian customs (Tollvesenet) may charge import duties and VAT on your parcel. These costs are outside our control. We recommend checking Norway's customs rules before ordering.

faqs.question: What is the minimum order?
faqs.answer: For Stockholm local delivery: minimum order is 300 SEK. For DHL shipping to the rest of Sweden and Europe: no minimum order amount.

faqs.question: Can I pick up my order from the store?
faqs.answer: Yes! Store pickup is always FREE. Select 'Store Pickup' at checkout and collect from Bandhagsplan 4, 12432 Bandhagen Centrum. You'll receive a notification when your order is ready.

faqs.question: Do you have halal products?
faqs.answer: Yes! We stock a wide range of halal-certified packaged goods, spices, rice and snacks. Please note we have currently paused our fresh and frozen halal meat selection.

faqs.question: Can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Yes. All DHL orders come with a tracking number sent to your email once dispatched. Track your parcel at dhl.se or the DHL app.

faqs.question: Do you deliver frozen food to other cities?
faqs.answer: No. Frozen foods and fresh produce can only be delivered within Stockholm via our local delivery service. We cannot ship frozen or fresh items via DHL to other cities or countries.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: We are at Bandhagsplan 4, 12432 Bandhagen Centrum, Stockholm. Get directions: https://g.co/kgs/5e3Ufch

faqs.question: Do you deliver to Kalmar?
faqs.answer: Yes! We ship to Kalmar and all Kalmar County via DHL in 2–4 business days. You can choose home delivery or pick up from a DHL Service Point (ICA Berga Centrum, Mekonomen, Direkten Tobaksboden).

faqs.question: Do you sell south Indian groceries?
faqs.answer: Yes! We stock dosa mix, idli mix, sambhar powder, rasam powder, dried curry leaves, coconut chutney mix, and more South Indian products.

faqs.question: What rice brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We stock India Gate, Lal Qilla, Falak, Tilda, Guard and more — in sizes from 1 kg to 20 kg.

faqs.question: What spice brands do you stock?
faqs.answer: We carry Shaan, National, MDH, TRS, Shan, East End and many more. Full ranges of masala mixes, whole spices, and ground spices.

faqs.question: Do you have atta / chapati flour?
faqs.answer: Yes! We stock Elephant Atta, Pride of India, Sunwhite, and Aashirvaad in 5 kg and 10 kg bags.

faqs.question: How do I contact you?
faqs.answer: Phone & WhatsApp: +46 728 494 801. Email: hello@ideallivs.com. WhatsApp chat: https://wa.me/46728494801

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes — for Stockholm local delivery in nearby areas (Bandhagen, Högdalen, Hagsätra, Rågsved, Stureby, Farsta, Älvsjö). Order before 4 PM (16:00) for delivery 7 PM – 10 PM the same evening.

halal.description: We stock a wide range of halal-certified products including frozen halal chicken, lamb, beef, and many packaged goods. Look for the halal certification label.
halal.note: We have currently paused fresh and frozen halal meat. Halal-certified packaged goods are still available.

vegetarian.description: The vast majority of our dry goods, spices, rice, lentils, flours, and snacks are vegetarian-friendly.

vegan.description: Many of our products are vegan — rice, lentils, spices, oils, and most dry goods contain no animal products.

gluten_free.description: We stock several gluten-free options including rice, lentils, and dedicated gluten-free products.
